title: Hi, I am trying to make a copy of a card from one board to another board using automation but, the updates are not getting copied. Is there a possibility to copy the updates as well while making a copy of a card from one board to another
excerpt: Hi, I am trying to make a copy of a card from one board to another board using automation but, the updates are not getting copied. Is there a possibility to copy the updates as well while making a copy of a card from one…

posts.author: Gopinath (GOPINATH MOHANAKUMAR)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I am trying to make a copy of a card from one board to another board using automation but, the updates are not getting copied. Is there a possibility to copy the updates as well while making a copy of a card from one board to another.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Gopinath ,

Unfortunately copying over updates to new items is not possible. You would need to either move the item, have a Make implementation or use something like the Conversations App.

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! I recommend you check the app “Same Item Multiple Boards” - seems like a perfect fit to your use case: monday.com: Apps Marketplace
